free_text: Khitrov, Kholnov, Le Hong Khiem, Popov,
Scattering by graphite in tangential through-channel,
Pb and Fe collimators, 510 mm Si-monocrystal as filter
Beam size at target position 35x5 mm.
placed at 20 mm distance from target, shield by
6 mm Li2-C-O3, 3 mm Pb sheet and by heavy Pb blocks.
Ba-C-O3, weight 4.2 g, Ba-134 content is 85.5 %,
Ba-135 content is 6 %, Ba-136,137 content is 1.4 %,
Ba-138 content is 5.7 %, Ba-130,132 content is 0.1 %.
Sample was enclosed in polyethylene foil.
Data are taken from the reference
M.M. Entry was corrected. Dates corrected.
Mixed target of barium oxide and pure aluminium metal.
SAMPLE and CORRECTION lines were added.
Conversion coefficient 5.39 was taken into account.
Units in article are gammas per thousand of captured
STATUS was added.DATA units were corrected.
DATA and DATA-ERR were multiplied by 1.E-3.
LVL-INI was added. FLAG values were corrected.
